## Summary

What changed and why.

## Plan authorization

Which active plan (or documented scope) authorizes this change:

- [ ] `docs/plans/active/...`

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Feature (plan-authorized)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Validation

Confirm all commands pass from repository root:

- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run basedpyright`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `docs/DECISIONS.md`, or `docs/PROGRESS.md` when required
- [ ] No secrets or local artifacts included

## Test plan

How you verified the change (commands run, scenarios tested).
